title: Wise Owl Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool | Medium 7-8cm | Bird Fondant Stamp Kitchen Accessory
description:
Introducing our charming Wise Owl Cookie Cutter — the perfect tool for creating adorable owl-shaped cookies, fondant toppers, and craft projects! Whether you're a seasoned baker or just starting your cookie-decorating journey, this delightful cutter brings a touch of woodland whimsy to every batch. The wise owl design features beautiful details including large round eyes, feathered wings, and a sweet perched posture that captures the character of everyone's favorite nocturnal bird.

Features:
Our Wise Owl Cookie Cutter is carefully designed and 3D printed with precision to ensure clean, consistent cuts every single time. The cutter produces sharp outlines while being gentle enough to press through soft doughs, fondant, modeling clay, and even craft foam. The comfortable grip edge on top allows for easy pressing without discomfort, and the cutting edge is refined to give you beautifully defined owl shapes. Each cutter is inspected for quality before shipping to make sure you receive a flawless product ready to use right out of the package.

Dimensions:
This listing is for our Medium (M) size, which measures approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at the widest point. This versatile size is ideal for standard cookies, cupcake toppers, and decorative fondant pieces. It's large enough to showcase the owl's charming details while still fitting neatly on a standard baking sheet. If you need a different size, please check our shop for additional options.

How to Use:
For best results, lightly dust your cookie cutter and work surface with flour or cornstarch before cutting. Roll your dough to an even thickness of about 4-6mm for optimal results. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then gently lift and push out the shape if needed using a small spatula or toothpick. For fondant work, a light coating of powdered sugar works wonderfully to prevent sticking. You can also use this cutter with modeling clay, play dough, or other craft materials for non-food creative projects.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water with mild soap immediately after use and allow to air dry completely before storing. Avoid exposing the cutter to hot water or high temperatures, as PLA can soften and warp above 60°C (140°F). With proper care, your cookie cutter will last for many baking sessions to come. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

Gift Ideas:
This Wise Owl Cookie Cutter makes a wonderful gift for so many occasions! It's a thoughtful stocking stuffer for the baker in your family, a unique addition to a housewarming gift basket, or a creative party favor for woodland-themed baby showers and birthday celebrations. Teachers will especially love receiving this owl-themed baking tool as an end-of-year or holiday appreciation gift, since the wise owl is a beloved symbol of knowledge and learning. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for an unforgettable handmade gift set that's both personal and practical.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is lovingly handmade and 3D printed to order in small batches, ensuring the highest quality and attention to detail. We take pride in designing unique, creative shapes that you won't find in ordinary stores. Because each piece is printed individually, slight variations may occur, making your cutter truly one of a kind. Thank you for supporting our small creative business — we can't wait to see what you bake!
